mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (phone, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, target_direction_id, target_school, exam_year, role, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{user.phone}, #{user.email}, #{user.passwordHash}, #{user.nickname}, #{user.avatarUrl}, #{user.targetDirectionId}, #{user.targetSchool}, #{user.examYear}, #{user.role}, #{user.status}, #{user.createdAt}, #{user.updatedAt})
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
phone = #{user.phone}, email = #{user.email}, password_hash = #{user.passwordHash}, nickname = #{user.nickname}, avatar_url = #{user.avatarUrl}, target_direction_id = #{user.targetDirectionId}, target_school = #{user.targetSchool}, exam_year = #{user.examYear}, role = #{user.role}, status = #{user.status}, last_login_at = #{user.lastLoginAt}, last_active_date = #{user.lastActiveDate}, updated_at = NOW(3)
WHERE id = #{user.id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
